title: Add --version flag to the greet CLI
description:
## Summary

`greet --version` should print the tool name and version so users know which build they run.

## Acceptance Criteria

* `node bin/greet.mjs --version` prints `ExampleCLI <version>` (e.g. `ExampleCLI 1.2.3`) and exits 0.
* Version value is read from package.json metadata — not hardcoded.
